there's 2 types of banner: standard and limited
limited has a duration and it features a limited character (if you go for them, you can lose pity and you will only get standard characters from their realm)
standard is permanent, you pick 1 of the 4 realms and the banner gives you characters of that realm every time you hit pity
the best standard banner to pull on is the aequor one, with goliath, caecus, and sanga being solid while celeste and faros are a little eh, but it's the best one in terms of value
in terms of limited, thais is the best caro support and has a banner going rn for 2 more weeks, while tulu is a solid aequor damage dealer that will be coming to standard soon (with lower rates)
i would suggest going for thais and by extension her wheel
tulu's wheel is also a decent pull if you plan on getting him down the line but a lesser priority for a new acc
